response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior Software Engineer with strong backend and distributed systems expertise, but he lacks the executive leadership experience required for a CTO role. There is no evidence on his resume of scaling engineering organizations, managing outsourced partners, or communicating technical roadmaps at the board level. Furthermore, while he has some recent exposure to AI tooling, he lacks the required production experience designing complex multi-agent AI architectures for high-stakes fintech applications.
strengths: Deep backend and distributed systems experience, including building low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience across full-stack, web, and embedded systems using multiple languages.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Zero executive leadership experience; lacks a track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or managing external partners.
Lacks production experience building and operating stateful, multi-agent AI systems in regulated or commercial financial environments.
No demonstrated experience in AI-native fintech integration, such as algorithmic working-capital allocation or real-time credit risk.
